title: 追試とかいう重ね塗り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway when I hear
someone come up quickly behind me.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Trainer! I'd like to discuss Jordan's
recent exam with you...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What's up? You need me for something?
choice_data_list: I hear you failed your exam.
I hear you failed your exam.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Teehee. ☆
choice_data_list:
It's not funny. We need to prepare for the
makeup.

It's not funny. We need to prepare for the
makeup.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: "We"? Oh come on, seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Students typically have to keep retaking tests
until they manage to pass, so the longer that
takes, the less time they have to practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Passing a test also provides a sense of
accomplishment, which is sure to have a positive
effect on her growth as a runner.
choice_data_list: Don't you want to "win" the test?
Don't you want to "win" the test?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You really think making it like a race is gonna
motivate me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan is having a staring contest with the
question sheet on her desk.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ummm... uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I've got no clue... What do I write?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I don't know the formula. Like, there's way too
much stuff to remember...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, she failed because she couldn't
memorize the material well enough.
choice_data_list:
In that case, let's try studying while you move
your body!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Um... What's this?
choice_data_list:
Try reading it aloud while doing some light
running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hand her a notepad with all the formulas she
needs to know for the makeup test.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
While running? No way! That's so embarrassing!
Not happening!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Science tells us that light exercise can aid in
memorization. For an Umamusume, studying while
running sounds perfect.
choice_data_list: So you're just going to let this test beat you?
So you're just going to let this test beat you?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: No fair! Don't say it like that!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Tangent! Equals! Sine over cosine!
choice_data_list: What's the equation for motion?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uhhhh, F=ma?!
choice_data_list: You've got it!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Great job, Jordan! You passed all your makeup
tests!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Great job? I know. I'm just too good, aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well, mostly because my trainer made me do this
silly exercise.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you got study tips from your trainer? Does
that mean there's a secret study method that
works on you? I'll have to ask for the details.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...I really don't think that's a good idea. Copying
Trainer is not gonna be a good look.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Honestly... I don't think I'd listen if anyone else
told me to do that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a glance at the problem Tosen Jordan is
working through. It looks like a mathematical
proof.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So n is an odd number, which means n is 2k + 1,
and then...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Something seems off. What was it the
teacher said earlier...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan pulls out her eraser and completely
erases her partially solved equation.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh...
choice_data_list: Why did you erase everything?
Why did you erase everything?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Cause I was definitely doing it wrong. Why bother
when you know it's gonna get a big fat red X?
choice_data_list: You should write it out, even if it's wrong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since it's a proof, she can still get partial credit
for the correct parts even if she ends up with the
wrong answer.
choice_data_list:
I'd also like your teacher to see how hard you're
working.

I'd also like your teacher to see how hard you're
working.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You really are a trainer through and through.
choice_data_list: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Just what I said.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan continues working diligently on her
practice problems.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I just barely failed my makeup test. Gotta do it
again.
choice_data_list: That's too bad...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But I'll definitely get it next time. Even my
teacher said so, because I've been working so
hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling she's more motivated than usual
in her training today.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So, real talk, do you think studying is, like,
important?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I bet you can't solve these problems either. Be
honest, you've forgotten all these formulas,
haven't you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan looks at me doubtfully, so I glance
at her test.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The subject appears to be math, specifically
probability. Looking more closely, it involves
combinations, which means...
choice_data_list: Uhh, what was that formula again?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I knew it! You don't remember!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's like all the knowledge flew out of my head as
soon as I looked at it. I was pretty good with
math when I was in school...
choice_data_list: But I do remember that I studied hard.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah?
choice_data_list: That's probably why I'm still able to study now.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Now? ...Oh.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Do trainers have things they have to study too?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: All right, I'll do some reviewing!
All right, I'll do some reviewing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take out a notepad and write down the problem
that she's been working on.
choice_data_list: Let's see who can solve it first!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! We're competing?! H-hang on a sec!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You've already started working on it! Cheater! No
false starts!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Let me get this straight... You'd like to take the
makeup test as well?
choice_data_list: I think that'll really get Jordan motivated!

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: Are you out of your mind?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As for the results... Well, let's just say it was a
good competition for the both of us.
